description: FarmacoGraph graph integrity constraints. Each constraint has a unique FG-C identifier.

constraints.name: drug_must_not_target_disease
constraints.description: Drug must never TARGET Disease. Use TREATS for therapeutic indications.

constraints.name: drug_must_not_is_a_disease
constraints.description: Drug must never IS_A Disease.

constraints.name: mechanism_dag_acyclic
constraints.description: Mechanism subgraphs (PRECEDES, BRANCHES_TO, MERGES_INTO) must not contain cycles.

constraints.name: interaction_symmetric
constraints.description: INTERACTS_WITH and AVOID_WITH must exist in both directions with matching metadata.

constraints.name: no_self_interaction
constraints.description: Drug must not INTERACTS_WITH itself.

constraints.name: is_a_dag_acyclic
constraints.description: IS_A and PART_OF hierarchies must not contain cycles.

constraints.name: learning_graph_acyclic
constraints.description: REQUIRES prerequisite graph must not contain cycles.

constraints.name: published_drug_has_class
constraints.description: Published Drug must have at least one IS_A or BELONGS_TO DrugClass.

constraints.name: published_drug_has_indication
constraints.description: Published Drug must have at least one TREATS or PREVENTS relationship.

constraints.name: evidence_cannot_treat_disease
constraints.description: Evidence nodes cannot directly TREAT diseases.

constraints.name: references_via_evidence_only
constraints.description: References must never replace Evidence. Clinical edges link to Evidence, not Reference directly.

constraints.name: published_clinical_edge_requires_evidence
constraints.description: Published clinical/mechanistic edges require at least one SUPPORTED_BY Evidence link.

constraints.name: education_no_clinical_edges
constraints.description: Education nodes must never be source or target of clinical relationship types.

constraints.name: education_no_biomedical_assertions
constraints.description: Education content must not modify biomedical truth. Only ILLUSTRATES edges to facts.

constraints.name: published_mechanism_has_root
constraints.description: Published Drug must have HAS_MECHANISM_ROOT to at least one MechanismFragment.

constraints.name: mechanism_terminal_outcome
constraints.description: Mechanism DAG leaf nodes should RESULTS_IN a ClinicalOutcome, SideEffect, or PhysiologicalProcess.

constraints.name: no_orphan_mechanism_fragments
constraints.description: Published MechanismFragments must be reachable from at least one Drug HAS_MECHANISM_ROOT.

constraints.name: provenance_required
constraints.description: No biomedical entity or relationship may exist without provenance metadata.

constraints.name: confidence_metadata_required
constraints.description: Published clinical relationships must include confidence_score and evidence_level.

constraints.name: explanation_required_published
constraints.description: Published clinical and mechanistic edges require explanation property.

constraints.name: no_duplicate_external_id
constraints.description: No two published entities may share the same external ID within a vocabulary.

constraints.name: atc_class_consistency
constraints.description: Drug ATC prefix should match DrugClass ATC prefix.

constraints.name: workflow_no_direct_publish
constraints.description: Entities cannot transition directly from draft to published. Must pass review and approved states.

constraints.name: deprecated_has_successor
constraints.description: Deprecated entities should have superseded_by pointer.

constraints.name: causes_requires_mechanism_path
constraints.description: CAUSES edges should have RESULTS_FROM path to MechanismFragment or mechanism_summary in metadata.

constraints.name: first_line_requires_guideline
constraints.description: FIRST_LINE_FOR should have RECOMMENDED_BY Guideline or SUPPORTED_BY Evidence.

constraints.name: broken_link_detection
constraints.description: All relationship targets must reference existing nodes.

constraints.name: ai_draft_not_publishable
constraints.description: AI-assisted drafts (source=ai_assisted_draft) cannot be published without curator attestation.

constraints.name: education_layer_flag
constraints.description: All EducationResource nodes must have content_layer=education.

constraints.name: postgres_no_biomedical_duplication
constraints.description: PostgreSQL must not store biomedical entity content. Only operational metadata.
